name: restaurant-pos-system
description: Desktop Restaurant POS System with LAN Multi-Device Support

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.build:desktop: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build
scripts.build:desktop:win: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build:win
scripts.build:desktop:mac: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build:mac
scripts.build:desktop:linux: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build:linux
scripts.publish:win: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run publish:win
scripts.publish:mac: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run publish:mac
